summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Dashboard and Rostering features for ProCare Hub. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified Dashboard loads with all 6 stat cards, Quick Actions work, Rostering page displays shift data correctly with Export dropdown (PDF/Excel options).
critical_code_review_comments: Staff model correctly uses Optional[str] for position field to handle legacy data
Shifts API returns normalized data with shift_date and duration_hours fields
Dashboard stats endpoint returns all required fields for admin view
Export functionality uses CSV for Excel and print dialog for PDF (no jspdf library needed for current implementation)
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_dashboard_rostering.py - Created comprehensive test suite for dashboard and rostering APIs
seed_data_creation: Demo data already present: 9 clients, 9 staff members, 105 shifts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard and Rostering features fully tested. Backend APIs working: /api/dashboard/stats, /api/staff, /api/shifts, /api/clients, /api/shift-templates, /api/recurring-shifts, /api/company-settings. Frontend verified: Dashboard stat cards (Total Clients, Total Staff, Upcoming Shifts, Pending Invoices, Compliance Issues, Total Revenue), Quick Actions (Schedule New Shift, Add New Client, Create Invoice, View Compliance), Rostering page with shift table and Export dropdown (Excel CSV and PDF options).

tests: Dashboard loads correctly with role-based stats (admin view)
Dashboard displays: total clients (9), total staff (9), upcoming shifts (0), pending invoices (1), compliance issues (0), total revenue ($7,324.76)
Dashboard quick actions work - links to rostering, clients, invoices, compliance verified
Rostering page loads with shift list (105 shifts)
Export button exists on Roster page with dropdown
Export dropdown shows 'Export to Excel (CSV)' and 'Export to PDF' options
Roster shows shift data: date/time, client, staff, service type, duration, status
Staff API returns staff list without errors (9 staff members)
Shifts API returns normalized shift data with shift_date and duration_hours fields
Dashboard stats API returns all required fields
Shift templates and recurring shifts endpoints working

mocked_apis_note: None - all APIs are real and functional
